response.original_title: Household Horrors - John John’s Bizarre Adventure
response.overview: John John and Jimmy John are back, and better than ever! In this latest stoner-comedy, they face a new threat, stronger than any other! They’re gonna need a whole lot of planning…and some plot… in order to destroy their biggest foe yet!
response.tagline: HEY JIMMY JOHN WHOS AT THE DOOR?
response.title: Household Horrors - John John’s Bizarre Adventure
